name_en: CHANE* 24b Double C logo mini flap, made of polished calfskin quilted, soft, delicate, and elastic. Large Double C logo paired with vintage sand gold hardware, full of personality, a perfect blend of retro and fashion, super eye-catching, looks stylish with any outfit! Simple yet not simple design, looks stunning on. From leather selection to stitching, every detail is carefully crafted, offering high durability and practicality. Whether appearance or inner quality, it withstands the test of time. This Chanel calfskin mini flap is definitely a fashion lover's choice. Made of precious black gold calfskin, delicate and soft, exuding noble temperament, highlighting feminine softness while remaining elegant. Classic large Double C logo makes this bag even more brilliant. Can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, fits a phone and daily essentials, high usage rate, making you look elegant and intellectual. A must-have bag!
